---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Description
Describe the feature clearly.

## Problem It Solves
Explain what problem this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you plan to implement it.

## Possible Alternatives
Mention any alternative approaches considered.

## Additional Context
Add screenshots or references if needed.
